nasb.text: for they had not gained any insight from the incident of the loaves, but their heart was hardened.

esv.text: for they did not understand about the loaves, but their hearts were hardened.

cnv.text: 因為他們還不明白分餅這件事的意義，他們的心還是遲鈍。

ccb.text: 因为他们仍然不明白耶稣分饼那件事的意义，心里还是愚顽。

csbs.text: 因为他们不领悟分饼的事，他们还是硬着心。
